title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — Office of the Comptroller (Pre-2010 DDS Examiner Payroll)
description: Ready-to-file Massachusetts Public Records Law (M.G.L. c. 66, § 10) request to the Office of the Comptroller of the Commonwealth (CTR) for archival HRCMS per-employee payroll records for Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) employees whose position title matches the Disability Determination Services examiner series ('DISAB EXAMINER'), for calendar years 2001-2009. These years predate the public CTHRU portal (which begins CY2010) and are needed to complete the long-run examiner pay-and-overtime series. Requests the same column layout as the public CTHRU dataset rxhc-k6iz (name, title, grade, bargaining unit, annual rate, regular/overtime/other/buyout/total pay) so the older years append cleanly to data/pay-scales/vde-annual-salary-by-employee.csv. Written in an individual capacity.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts (statewide HRCMS payroll; MRC departmental records, DDS examiner titles)

source.publisher: Office of the Comptroller of the Commonwealth (CTR) — Records Access Officer (request target)
source.title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — M.G.L. c. 66, § 10

update_cadence: One-time gap fill (no cadence once 2001-2009 are obtained).
notes: Confidence tier = Authoritative because this file IS the canonical, repo-maintained request template/form. Requester contact fields are filled for Wardis Vizcaino. Custodian is the Comptroller (NOT MassAbility) because the Comptroller operates the HRCMS payroll system that feeds CTHRU; CTHRU's public data starts CY2010, so 2001-2009 must come from archival HRCMS. This is option (a) of the three pre-2010-gap options in docs/methodology.md. If obtained, write into data/pay-scales/vde-annual-salary-by-employee-2001-2009.csv with a source column noting the PRR.
